leads.name: Alex Rivera
leads.title: Founder
leads.bio: E-commerce founder running a Shopify app studio; writes about growth, retention, and customer intelligence for early-stage store teams.
leads.source: LinkedIn engagement on e-commerce AI post
leads.engagement_context: Commented that his team still does manual store analysis in spreadsheets and needs better customer segment insights.
leads.personalized_message:
Hi Alex Rivera,

I noticed your recent activity about manual store analysis - it really resonated with what we're seeing across the e-commerce intelligence.

As a Founder at CartPilot Labs, you might be interested in ExampleAI (https://example.ai). We built it specifically for professionals dealing with manual store analysis.

Early feedback has been encouraging, with users telling us: "Turns store and customer signals into weekly GTM actions." That could be a game changer for CartPilot Labs's e-commerce intelligence work.

Would love to get your thoughts if you have 5 minutes to check it out. Happy to answer any questions!

Best,
[Your name]
